subcodes.first_line: O distinguished and noble one! I have chanted verses of thanksgiving to God, inasmuch as He hath caused the heart of 'Abdu'l-Bahá to incline towards thee and hath dilated thy breast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفاضل الجلیل انی رتلت ایات شکرک لله بما حنن علیک قلب عبدالبهاء و شرح صدرک
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
